svg.title: OneBrain — the car analogy
svg.desc: Pick any harness (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, or Codex) as the car. OneBrain is the plug-in unit that rides with you: a plug-in ECU (skills, hooks, behavior — the same on every brand), onebrain-cli (the toolkit — native index, search, tasks, and scheduling that run the same on every car), plus your driver profile (memory, vault, context) that travels with you, not the car.
